prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan YD25DDTi (2.5L turbo-diesel) with a forged crankshaft and billet connecting rods from Tomei, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) for 350+ hp and 550 Nm of torque, supported by a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system from HKS with a 4-inch titanium tip

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade including a 12mm Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pump, 1000cc Denso injectors, and a custom ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (Stage 3+ tune) with EGR and DPF delete for optimized airflow and power delivery

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping) and custom-valved rear leaf springs from Alcan Springs, paired with polybushings from SuperPro and a front sway bar from Whiteline (24mm adjustable) for improved handling and load capacity
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny Navara-specific kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with carbon fiber overfenders and a vented hood from Seibon Carbon for heat dissipation

Front bumper replacement with a custom steel winch bumper from ARB (with integrated LED light bar and recovery points), paired with a set of 17-inch Method MR701 wheels (ET15 offset) wrapped in 285/70R17 BFGoodrich KO2 tires for aggressive off-road stance

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara), a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (MIG-welded 4130 chromoly), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay from 3D Carbon, including a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada
